message:
chore(beads): enrich 33 issue descriptions across fsqlite, ftui, and concurrency workstreams

Bulk enrichment pass expanding implementation details for 33 open issues:
- 13 FrankenSQLite migration issues (SQL audit, port plans, test strategies)
- 9 FrankenTUI migration issues (screen ports, widgets, Elm Model, inline mode)
- 8 concurrency/reliability issues (MVCC, structured concurrency, shutdown,
  backpressure, Cx-aware mutex, Outcome type)
- 3 cross-cutting issues (asupersync evidence sink, macaroon authorization,
  ratatui removal)

Promotes bd-3lu (structured concurrency regions) to in_progress, adjusts
dependencies on bd-9us and bd-a38. Includes 35 br_history point-in-time
recovery snapshots from the enrichment session.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
